stat_block.Name: Reliance
stat_block.Description: A culture of self-sufficiency and stoicism, characterized by a unique biology and societal structure.

Abilities.name: Subterranean Labyrinth
Abilities.description: The Reliance's domain is a maze-like network of tunnels, designed to repel and neutralize intruders.
Abilities.effect: Disorientation by Design, Engineered Collapse, Decay as a Weapon

Abilities.name: Fungal Alloy
Abilities.description: The Reliance's biological essence, immune to chaos and used for defense and creation.

Vulnerabilities.name: Rooting and Regrowth
Vulnerabilities.description: During the rooting and regrowth phase, the individual is in a completely helpless state, vulnerable to destruction.

lore: An Exposé on The Reliance: Stoicism, Self-Sufficiency, and Sacrifice
